whyCandidateMatters: Excavated Houses of Fustat would broaden the project beyond the current 41-record set and improve district, type, or period coverage. Coverage value: this record would expand the Abbasid–Fatimid layer in Fustat through a domestic archaeology rather than duplicating an existing published monument.
knownResearchGaps: Confirm a direct monument-specific institutional or academic source.
Validate current identity, coordinates, and survival condition.
